Header file for defining Git version information with placeholders for timestamp, tag, version, and commit.

# Purpose
This header file defines preprocessor macros for version control metadata. It includes macros for the Git timestamp, tag, major version, minor version, patch version, and commit revision. These macros are placeholders that are intended to be replaced with actual values during the build process. The file is used to embed version information into a software application, allowing the application to access its own version details at runtime. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
